data.title: UXLINK: The community unanimously approved the buyback and strategic reserve proposal, which will repurchase no less than 1% of tokens each month.
data.description: UXLINK announced on the X platform that the community has unanimously approved the buyback and strategic reserve proposal. According to the implementation plan, UXLINK will launch the program in December, using project profits each month to buy back no less than 1% of UXLINK's total supply and deposit it into the strategic reserve.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Trading Activity Observed in Key Address
data.description: According to Odaily, monitoring by Ai Yi has revealed significant trading activity from a specific address (0x50b...9f20). Since yesterday, this address has initiated a long position in Ethereum (ETH) and a short position in Bitcoin (BTC) nine hours ago. Currently, the address holds a long position of 27,304 ETH, valued at $80.04 million, with an opening price of $2,931.9, resulting in an unrealized loss of $5,543. Additionally, it holds a short position of 250.36 BTC, valued at $21.91 million, with an opening price of $87,334.2, leading to an unrealized loss of $46,000. Since July of this year, the account has accumulated a profit of $3.638 million.

data.title: Brother Machi has slightly increased his net long positions in ETH and HYPE over the past 24 hours.
data.description: Hyperinsight monitoring shows that "Brother Machi" has slightly increased his long positions in ETH and HYPE in the past 24 hours. As of press time, he holds long positions totaling $24.268 million: including a 25x leveraged long position in ETH, holding 8,200 ETH at a liquidation price of $2,874; and a 10x leveraged long position in HYPE, holding 8,888.88 HYPE.

data.title: Bitmain has recently significantly lowered the prices of its S19 and S21 Bitcoin mining machines.
data.description: Bitmain has recently significantly lowered the prices of its Bitcoin mining machines, with many S19/S21 series models now in the "sell-off" price range. Internal pricing shows the S19e XP Hydro and 3U S19 XP Hydro as low as $3/TH/s, and the S19 XP+ Hydro around $4/TH/s; the S21 immersion machine is around $7/TH/s, and the S21+ Hydro around $8/TH/s. Previously, the company offered an S19 XP+ Hydro bundled package for approximately $4/TH/s, and in November, it launched an auction-style sale of the S19k Pro with a starting price of $5.5/TH/s. Analysts point out that with network hashrate remaining near historical highs while Bitcoin prices have fallen, hashrate prices are hovering near multi-year lows, increasing pressure on the mining industry. This environment squeezes miners' profit margins, reduces demand for new equipment, especially inefficient models, and intensifies competition between ASIC miner manufacturers and secondhand market sellers. (TheMinerMag)

data.title: XRP Holds Critical Support as Traders Brace for a Potential Breakout or Breakdown
data.description:
XRP, the digital asset associated with the Ripple network, is currently maintaining a crucial support level that market analysts are closely monitoring. As traders assess market conditions and potential price movements, they are preparing for the possibility of a significant breakout to the upside that could propel the asset to new heights, or a breakdown to the downside that may lead to further declines. This critical juncture in XRP's trading pattern has captured the attention of both investors and speculators alike, who are eager to determine the next direction for this popular cryptocurrency.
source: https://blocknews.com/xrp-holds-critical-support-as-traders-brace-for-a-potential-breakout-or-breakdown/
